content: Remote OK Administrative Assistant Pickle <strong>About Us<br><br></strong>Pickle is a business enablement service. We provide fractional, embedded, human-led support across the functions that quietly keep growing businesses moving. EA and executive support, admin, customer support, operations, bookkeeping and HR.<br><br>We're not a recruitment agency, a consultancy or a software product. We sit in the gap between all three, and that gap is where the real work happens.<br><br>We work alongside founder and operator-led businesses at the moments when they need more capacity, more structure, or more support than they currently have. Our people embed into client businesses and take genuine ownership of the work. No task-ticking, no arm's-length delivery. Just real judgement and follow-through.<br><br>W<strong>hat it's like to work here<br><br></strong>We value autonomy and accountability. We are human-first in how we treat our clients, our candidates, and each other. We don't chase growth at the expense of quality, and we don't treat people like resources.<br><br>We are a small, growing team building something we genuinely believe in, and we are looking for people who want to be part of that.<br><br><strong>What We Care About<br><br></strong>Good work. Honest relationships. Doing things properly. We use technology and AI intentionally and we never let it replace the human judgement that actually makes the difference. We value calm over chaos, clarity over comfort, and ownership over excuses.<br><br><strong>The Client<br><br></strong>Our Client is a growing joinery business that needs virtual admin support to handle the day-to-day volume that comes with expansion.<br><br>This is a hands-on, customer-facing admin role <strong>covering approximately 40 hours per month</strong>. You'll be the first point of contact for customers by phone and email, and the person keeping quotes, invoices, and scheduling moving without anything slipping through the cracks.<br><br><strong>What You'll Be Doing<br><br></strong><ul><li> Managing emails and the general inbox</li><li> Handling inbound customer calls and enquiries</li><li> Booking appointments and managing scheduling</li><li> Preparing and sending out quotes</li><li> Raising and sending invoices</li><li> General admin support as the business grows<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li> UK based, with English as a first language</li><li> Experienced in small business admin â ideally with a background supporting trade, construction, or services businesses where the pace is practical and the work is varied</li><li> Comfortable picking up the phone and speaking with customers confidently and professionally</li><li> Able to turn around quotes and invoices accurately, without being chased</li><li> Organised and reliable â genuine ownership of a varied workload<br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong><ul><li> A varied, hands-on role at the centre of a growing business</li><li> Practical work with a direct, visible impact day to day</li><li> Flexible, remote working within GMT hours</li><li> 40 hours per month</li></ul> virtual assistant, embedded, hr Greater London, 2026-07-04T20:24:54+00:00 1134486 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-administrative-assistant-pickle-1134486 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Founder Ghostwriter for a U.S. based Google Ads Agency Paired Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that pairs remote work with top-tier talent. We admire the importance of innovative social media strategies and are committed to connecting talented individuals with great companies that need their unique skills. Our mission is to provide great jobs to gifted people, regardless of location.<br><br><strong>About The Client<br><br></strong>Our client is the fastest-growing Google Ads agency in the world. Led by founder and CEO Jem, the agency manages nine figures in annual ad spend across more than 180 eCommerce and DTC brands, powered by direct relationships with Google's product teams and access to alpha and beta features that most agencies never touch. Their strategies aren't public, their standards are exceptionally high, and their results speak for themselves.<br><br>The agency has grown rapidly because of the quality of its work while intentionally maintaining a senior, highly selective team. Their average client retention extends well beyond a yearâan uncommon achievement in the industry. Joining the team means working alongside some of the best operators in performance marketing and collaborating directly with a founder whose personal brand is quickly becoming one of the most influential voices in the space.<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br></strong>The voice already exists. It is defined, documented, and unmistakable. Your core focus is scripting LinkedIn and Twitter across every content pillar, at volume, without it ever reading like a content calendar and without it ever reading like AI. From there you will write Instagram video scripts and help shape where the personal brand goes next. This is not a role for someone who needs a brief for every post. It is for a writer who reads the founder's world, catches what is worth saying before anyone else does, helps steer the direction, and says it in his voice better than he would have.<br><br>Key Responsibilities<br><br><ul><li>Script LinkedIn and Twitter in the founder's voice across every content pillar: Google Ads and direct response thought leadership, the ecommerce operator perspective, agency building, business philosophy, and personal brand.</li><li>Write Instagram video scripts, and grow into other formats over time.</li><li>Help shape the direction and content pillars of the personal brand alongside the founder.</li><li>Research what is moving across DTC, direct response, and the wider space, and turn it into timely content before the feed catches up.</li><li>Work alongside the content team to keep voice and calendar tight.</li><li>Use Claude to produce at volume while knowing the difference between AI leverage and AI slop.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>Proven experience ghostwriting for a founder, executive, or personal brand. Portfolio required, this one is non negotiable.</li><li>Comfortable writing across platforms and shaping the voice to each: LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram video scripts.</li><li>Able to help direct a personal brand, not just take orders, and to write confidently across every content pillar.</li><li>A real grasp of direct response and what makes a person stop and read.</li><li>Native level English is essential. German is a bonus, not a requirement. Content is English only for now.</li><li>Daily, fluent use of Claude, already built into how you work.</li><li>Strong research instincts. You find the angle before the feed does.</li><li>Speed, plus the discipline to kill your own weak drafts before anyone sees them.</li><li>Hunger to learn the DTC and Google Ads world if you do not already live in it.<br><br></li></ul><str
